reviews.review_description: Back when it was only 1 level and one difficulty. These graphics were just so good for some reason. It doesn't compare to the newest version now it's just.. different.
i cant get into it but i played it once and kt was AMAZING
It’s really good for a demo yes it’s one song but it’s good
Wow
The best vr game i played

...and you guys got me.
Have to admit I never played this before, and after a few demo runs I had to buy the full version.
Yes, it's that good.
I actually think the quest is a perfect fit for this game, with the freedom of movement, play anywhere if you feel like it, while high end PC graphics don't really matter.
The demo itself, as mentioned, is just one level and he Tutorial. Good enough to get a feel for the general gameplay. Repeatable as often as one likes.
I played this one time and KNEW I was buying the full version.
really fun demo im considering on buying the full game this summer :)

reviews.review_title: Can I Get This On The Rift S?
reviews.review_description: I want to get this but I have the rift s is this possible?
I love how you have to hit it with swords to do the beat
Perfect score for a perfect game.

reviews.review_title: Icon cannot be removed on Quest
reviews.review_description: Icon cannot be removed on Quest even after purchasing the full version.
i got 140000 score
Nice

reviews.review_title: I wish more apps would have demo
reviews.review_description: Good job representing how it works and whether one would like it or not. Of course it's not going to have all the options.  That's why it's demo.

reviews.review_title: How should I decide with only one level?
reviews.review_description:
Unfortunately one level is not enough to make a decision to buy the game or not.
I would rather unlock the full version for 30 minutes and then limit it to one level.
broken demo does not allow application to be removed even when purchased full version!!! Come on Guys get it right.....

What a RIP-OFF!!!  You need ONE COPY FOR EACH PERSON, even on the SAME HEADSET.  What a Rip-OFF! I am NOT buying FOUR COPIES Just so the kids and I can each have our own scores. Talk about Price Gouging!!! 

I can understand one copy Per HEADSET, but not Per USER!!!

Not only that, but They won't allow the use of our OWN Music. Just another way to nickel and dime us.  If we own music through Amazon, iTunes, etc, why should we have to pay TWICE! That is, if it is even available in a add-on. 

Real VR Fishing allows us to use our own Music, so why doesn't BeatSaber?  

We can see it's possible, as it's seen on many youtube videos. So, there's already the ability to do it, they're just not happy with the profits from ONE copy of the App alone... Crooks!!! 

I won't pay for a SINGLE copy, even if it goes on sale (which it NEVER does). Not until they make it Multi-User on Each Headset.
demo

reviews.review_title: Just the taste I needed to purchase
reviews.review_description: If you’re a fan of guitar hero or Dance dance revolution this is the next evolution. With the demo you get 1 song, it’s fun and what I expect from a demo. I purchased the full game and am glad I did. Songs are good too, they have playlists in Spotify if you want to hear them.
